name: filter_01_quadratic_residue_bias
description: Checks if A is a quadratic residue modulo p using Euler's criterion, eliminating invalid elliptic curve parameters early.

name: filter_02_geometric_non_singular
description: Ensures the elliptic curve y^2 = x^3 + Ax is non-singular by rejecting A values where (4A^3 + 27) % p == 0.

name: filter_03_pseudorandom_search_order
description: Utilizes the SplitMix64 hash function to randomize the search order of A, avoiding getting stuck on values with specific modular structures and increasing the probability of finding a valid triple.

name: filter_04_algorithm
description: This filter uses the Legendre symbol to check if A is a quadratic residue modulo p.

name: filter_05_algorithm
description: This filter leverages the observation that certain values of A modulo small primes are less likely to be valid. [✅ HEURISTIC ACCEPTED]

name: filter_06_algorithm
description: This filter checks if A modulo a small prime (e.g., 7) falls into a specific set of residues [✅ HEURISTIC ACCEPTED]
